title: Pioneers (Official Video)
description: Official music video for 'Pioneers' — taken from the album Conflict::States (2021). Uber Rock Video of the Week. "This song is about all the people out there that truly believe in something and are bravely defiant, continually fighting till what they believe in is accepted by society." — Mark
